Product Details
Guide Rings / Wear Rings

Guiding elements for hydraulic cylinders that absorb side loads and prevent metal-to-metal contact.

← Back to Product Center

Industrial Product

Guide Rings / Wear Rings

Essential support components for pistons and rods in cylinders where alignment, wear control, and surface protection matter.

CHX Guide Rings and Wear Rings guide moving parts in hydraulic cylinders, absorb transverse forces, and protect sealing lips and metal surfaces from direct contact and accelerated wear.

Guiding Function

Keeps piston and rod movement more stable under side loading conditions.

Wear Protection

Prevents direct metal-to-metal contact and reduces wear on cylinder hardware.

Material Options

Can be selected around load level, friction behavior, and service environment.
